name: Ledger AI
description: Automated bookkeeping that reconciles your accounts in real time and flags anomalies before they become problems.

name: PulseCheck
description: Employee wellness platform with daily check-ins, burnout prediction, and actionable team health reports.

name: FlowDocs
description: Turn messy Notion pages and Google Docs into structured, versioned knowledge bases with one click.

name: TaxPilot
description: Small-business tax filing made simple — import your transactions, answer 10 questions, done.

name: CohortLens
description: Product analytics focused on retention — visualize user journeys and spot drop-off points at a glance.

name: ShiftBoard
description: Shift scheduling for hourly teams with automatic conflict detection, swap requests, and payroll exports.

name: VaultPass
description: Zero-knowledge password manager built for teams — granular permissions, audit logs, and SSO support.

name: InboxAI
description: Triage your support inbox automatically — classify, route, and draft replies using your past resolved tickets.
